---
title: "Teaching"
toc: true
---

## Teaching

I've been Lecturing on the following courses at the [MSc in Social Data Science](https://www.ku.dk/studies/masters/social-data-science):

- 2025 - Elementary Social Data Science
- 2024 - Social Data Science BaseCamp
- 2024 - Data Collection, Processing and Analysis
- 2023 - Advanced Social Data Science I, Social Network Analysis classes

Previous Teaching

- 2024 - Technical communications, Data Science program, ITU
- 2019-2020 - Introduction to Computer Programming in Python (MTH5001), QMUL
- 2018-2019 - Probability and Statistics I (MTH4116/MTH4216), QMUL

## Supervision

- 2023-Now - Multiple MSc students (40+), Co-supervisor. UCPH
- 2023 - Camilla Veronica Branas (MSc), Principal supervisor. UCPH
- 2023 - Anton Folkmann and Alexander Hjelmgaard (BSc.), Co-supervisor. ITU
- 2022 - Chiara Zappalà (Visiting PhD), Co-supervisor. ITU
- 2022 - Maria Elena Perruzza (External MSc, ISI Foundation), Co-supervisor. ITU
